---
title: "Methrix"
output: html_document
params:
    methrix_qc_dir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/EMseq_NewData/Methrix/h5_QC_SNP_filtered/
    outdir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/results/DMPK_Methylation/
    mae_hdf5_path: Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_MAE/h5MAE
---

```{r}
library(methrix)
```


```{r}
print(params)
```


## Read in Methrix object from shared disk
```{r}
meth <- methrix::load_HDF5_methrix(params$methrix_qc_dir)
```


## Select ISA file to get correct sample IDs
```{r}
isa_assay_prot <- readxl::read_xlsx('C:/Users/Casper.deVisser/Documents/ipsc-data-analysis/20240822_Xomics_iPSC_Neurons_new_READ-ONLY.xlsx', sheet = 'Assay - proteomics')
```

```{r}
library(MultiAssayExperiment)
library(HDF5Array)

mae <- loadHDF5MultiAssayExperiment(
  dir = params$mae_hdf5_path, 
  prefix = 'mae')

phenotype_data <- as.data.frame(colData(mae))
```


## Select TMEM132 region
```{r}
meth_subset <- methrix::subset_methrix(m = meth, regions = data.table(chr='chr12', start = 125671000, end =130650500))
```


## Combine with pheno df
```{r}
read_meth2df <- function(meth, isa_assay) {
  
  ## Feature metadata
  feature_metadata <- elementMetadata(meth)
  feature_metadata <- as.data.frame(feature_metadata)
  rownames(feature_metadata) <- paste0(feature_metadata$chr, '_', feature_metadata$start)
  
  ## Measurement data
  beta_values_df <- assays(meth)[[1]]
  
  ## Feature names
  rownames(beta_values_df) <- rownames(feature_metadata)

  beta_values_df <- data.frame(beta_values_df)

  return(list(beta_values_df, feature_metadata)) 
}
df_list <- read_meth2df(meth_subset, isa_assay_prot)
df <- data.frame(t(df_list[[1]]))
```



## Plot methylation in the DMPK region
```{r, fig.width=15, fig.height=4}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)


## Chromosome 12
df_long <- df %>%
  mutate(row_id = rownames(df)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -row_id,
    names_to = "Genome_Location",
    values_to = "Measurement"
  ) %>%
  mutate(Genome_Location = as.numeric(gsub("chr12_", "", Genome_Location)))

```

## Compare with older measurements
```{r}
df_avg_bio_reps <- read.csv('Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results/DMR/Avg_Meth_TMEM132.csv', row.names=1)
```

## Merge data
```{r}
df_avg_bio_reps_Clone1 <- df_avg_bio_reps[df_avg_bio_reps$Clone == "DM1 patient 2 clone 1",]
df_avg_bio_reps_Clone2 <- df_avg_bio_reps[df_avg_bio_reps$Clone == "DM1 patient 2 clone 2",]
df_avg_bio_reps_Clone3 <- df_avg_bio_reps[df_avg_bio_reps$Clone == "DM1 patient 2 clone 3",]

df_long_Clone1 <- df_long[df_long$row_id == 'YI.4419.iPS20.00035_1_val_1_bismark_bt2_pe',]
df_long_Clone2 <- df_long[df_long$row_id == 'YI.4419.iPS23.00089_1_val_1_bismark_bt2_pe',]
df_long_Clone3 <- df_long[df_long$row_id == "YI.4419.iPS23.00088_1_val_1_bismark_bt2_pe",]


merge_df_clone1 <- merge(df_avg_bio_reps_Clone1, df_long_Clone1, by = "Genome_Location")
merge_df_clone2 <- merge(df_avg_bio_reps_Clone2, df_long_Clone2, by = "Genome_Location")
merge_df_clone3 <- merge(df_avg_bio_reps_Clone3, df_long_Clone3, by = "Genome_Location")
```


## Clone 1
```{r}
cor_plot <- function(x, y, x_lab, y_lab, title = "Correlation") {
  
  ## Pearson correlation
  cor_value <- cor(x, y, use = 'complete.obs')

  ## ggplot
  ggp <- ggplot(data.frame(x, y), aes(x=x, y=y)) +
    geom_point(alpha =0.6, size=2) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = T, color = "#2C3E50", fill = "#3498DB") +
    annotate("text",
             x = Inf, y = -Inf,
             label = paste0("r = ", round(cor_value, 3)),
             hjust =1.1, vjust = -0.5,
             size = 4.5,
             fontface = "italic") +
    labs(title = title,
         x = x_lab, y = y_lab) +
    theme_minimal()
  
  return(ggp)

}


cor_plot(merge_df_clone1$Avr_Beta, 
         merge_df_clone1$Measurement, 
         x_lab = 'Avg Meth neurons',
         y_lab = 'Meth iPSC',
         title = 'Clone 1')
```

## Clone 2
```{r}
cor_plot(merge_df_clone2$Avr_Beta, 
         merge_df_clone2$Measurement, 
         x_lab = 'Avg Meth neurons',
         y_lab = 'Meth iPSC',
         title = 'Clone 2')
```


## Clone 3
```{r}
cor_plot(merge_df_clone3$Avr_Beta, 
         merge_df_clone3$Measurement, 
         x_lab = 'Avg Meth neurons',
         y_lab = 'Meth iPSC',
         title = 'Clone 3')
```



## Plot function
```{r, fig.width=17, fig.height=4}
plot_DMR <- function(df, coord_start, coord_end, gene_name) {
  df_plot <- df[df$Genome_Location > coord_start & df$Genome_Location < coord_end, ] 
  n_CpG <- length(unique(df_plot$Genome_Location))
  ggp <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = Genome_Location, y = Measurement, color = row_id, group = row_id)) +
    geom_line(size=1) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("#00BFC4", '#619CFF', '#F564E3')) +
    labs(title = paste0(n_CpG, ' CpGs, DMR mapped to ', gene_name), 
         x= 'GenomeLocation',
         y ='Beta-value') +
    coord_cartesian(ylim =c(0, 1)) +
    theme_bw()
  return(ggp)
}

ggp <- plot_DMR(df_long, 128266425, 128268660, 'TMEM132C')
ggp
ggsave('Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results/DMR/iPSC_Stage/Clones_TMEM132C.pdf', ggp, width=16, height =4)
```


## TMEM132D
```{r, fig.width=17, fig.height=4}
ggp <- plot_DMR(df_long, 129902900, 129904700, 'TMEM132D') 
ggp
ggsave('Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results/DMR/iPSC_Stage/Clones_TMEM132D.pdf', ggp, width=16, height =4)
```
